clean_headline: Mr. Prabhat Modi appointed as Non-Executive Non-Independent Director and Ms. Kirti Vishnu Tiwari appointed as Chief Financial Officer (in addition to Executive Director & CEO role) effective March 12, 2026
raw_headline: The Company has received disclosure dated 13.03.2026 from Prakruti Commosale Private Limited, Promoter Group regarding sale of 18,156 equity shares of the Company.

clean_headline: Choice Mutual Fund launches two new investment products: Choice Nifty 50 Index Fund and Choice Nifty Next 50 Index Fund.
raw_headline: BSE vide mail dated 18.03.2026 rejected the waiver application and directed  to pay the  SOP fine of Rs. 542800 including GST with regard to non compliance of Regulation 17(1) for the quarter ....
